---
title: "Proposal"
---

## Research question
As NAFLD fibrosis stage increases, do liver gene expression patterns shift toward increased inflammation and insulin resistance and decreased lipid metabolism?

State your main question in 1–2 sentences. We are just using plain text here. For example Alcohol-associated liver disease is influenced by both genetic and
environmental factors. In this project, we analyze publicly available transcriptomic data to evaluate...

## Dataset(s)
- Source: GSE135251 (GEO)
- Sample size:216 patients
- Key variables: Early 
        - fibrosis (F0–F1)
        - Advanced fibrosis (F3–F4)

- License/usage notes:

## Planned analysis
Describe your plan in bullets:
- Cleaning/QC
- Visualizations
- Statistical/ML approach
- How you’ll validate (train/test, CV, sensitivity checks, etc.)

## Deliverables
- Website sections
- Key figures/tables
- Any optional stretch goals
